ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_code" TEXT /* Code value for the event (Bits 5 - 0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "cvt_type" TEXT /* Type of CVT (Conversion Table) used for the event */,
  "roe_sub_function" TEXT /* Type of ROE (Response On Event) sub-function */,
  "mnemonic" TEXT /* Mnemonic for the event */,
  "event_type_record_length" INTEGER /* Length of the eventTypeRecord in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was last updated */,
  "operational_mode" TEXT /* Mode of operation (e.g., setup, control) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the event (e.g., 1 for high, 5 for low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner or operator of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner or operator */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner or operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner or operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner or operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner or operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the owner record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the owner record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the owner is active (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the data record */,
  "data_identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the data record */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the data record */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value (e.g., km, liters) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the event type record in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event type was last updated */,
  "is_system_event" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is a system event (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technical support, data analyst, vehicle operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that triggered the alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, informational) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was last updated */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing to the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being subscribed to */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the event */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subscription was last updated */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_subscriptions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_subscriptions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_windows" (
  "window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event window */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the window */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the window */,
  "window_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event window */,
  "window_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event window */,
  "window_status" TEXT /* Status of the event window (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the window was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the window was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the window */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the window */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_windows_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_windows_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_windows_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_windows_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
